betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Ore Acidizer§f processes ore samples with acids to extract materials.

§eOperation:§f
• Input ore samples + acidizer solvent
• Acid breaks down ore matrix
• Extract valuable materials

§eSolvents:§f
Different solvents yield different materials:
• Basic → Common materials
• Advanced → Rare materials
• §bHigh-Performance§f → Rarest (Bismuth, Tc-99)

§aTip:§f Install §bEffectiveness upgrade§f to reduce expensive solvent consumption.
